title: Recipe 1 for Avibacterium paragallinarum Strains from Yangzhou
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"aq1e3","text":"This recipe was generated by our Deep16SCulture AI framework for Avibacterium paragallinarum Strains from Yangzhou University.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"u2x5e","text":"- Add horse blood and NAD/Hemin post-autoclaving (50°C).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"c3tru","text":"- Incubate at 37°C with 5% CO₂.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"d7y13","text":"- Columbia agar: 39,000 mg","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":2,"length":13}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ydsog","text":"- Horse blood: 100 ml (critical for XV factors)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":2,"length":11},{"style":"italic","offset":22,"length":25}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"b5om5","text":"- NAD (V factor): 10 mg (added)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":2,"length":14},{"style":"italic","offset":24,"length":7}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"wrthk","text":"- Hemin (X factor): 5 mg (added)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":2,"length":16},{"style":"italic","offset":25,"length":7}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"sgspx","text":"- Water: 1,000 ml","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":2,"length":5}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Add horse blood and NAD/Hemin post-autoclaving (50°C).
